name: Pork Tenderloin in Tequila
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread mustard over the pork tenderloin.
2. Heat oil and garlic in a 10-inch skillet until hot.
3. Cook pork in oil over medium heat until browned.
4. Remove garlic.
5. Stir in remaining ingredients except parsley.
6. Bring to boiling, then reduce heat.
7. Cover and simmer until pork is done (about 30 minutes).
8. Remove bay leaf and sprinkle with parsley.
9. Serve.
